entity.summary: Decentralized exchange and liquidity protocol on Metis providing token swaps, limit orders, dynamic AMM pools, concentrated-liquidity V3 pools, staking, yield features, and launchpad functionality.
entity.notes: HEI models Hercules base, V2, and V3 discovery rows as one Metis DEX entity. Current first-party documentation describes a Camelot-derived liquidity protocol on Metis with swaps, limit orders, dynamic AMM pools, concentrated liquidity, staking, incentives, and launchpad functions.

evidence.title: Hercules Overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Hercules as a Metis liquidity protocol with seamless swaps, staking, real yield, dynamic AMM support, concentrated-liquidity features, referral swaps, and launchpad functionality.

evidence.title: Hercules Token Swap Tutorial
evidence.notes: Current first-party trading guide documents active swaps, slippage and routing settings, multi-hop execution, wallet settlement, and limit-order functionality through the Hercules application.

evidence.title: Hercules Add Liquidity V3
evidence.notes: First-party V3 documentation describes active concentrated-liquidity provision, manual and automated range strategies, liquidity distribution, and LP transaction execution.
